90-Second Blood Sugar Video Ad Script

Stop drinking coffee until you see what it's really doing to your blood sugar...

If you're diabetic or pre-diabetic, that morning cup of coffee isn't just giving you energy - it's quietly sabotaging your glucose levels all day long.

Most people have no idea that coffee triggers a stress hormone called cortisol, which signals your liver to dump stored glucose directly into your bloodstream.

I'm Dr. [Expert Name], a board-certified endocrinologist who's treated over 10,000 diabetic patients in my 18-year career.

Here's what shocked me: Even decaf coffee can spike blood sugar because it's not the caffeine that's the problem - it's how coffee disrupts something called your "cellular glucose doors."

You see, your cells have tiny protein channels called GLUT4 transporters that act like microscopic doors, allowing glucose to enter where it belongs. But coffee creates inflammation that makes these doors "rusty and stuck."

That's why I spent months researching an ancient Himalayan rice ritual that actually repairs these cellular glucose doors in just 30 seconds a day.

The people of this region have been using a specific golden spice with their rice for centuries - and they have virtually no diabetes despite eating high-carb diets. I'm not talking about turmeric here. As a big natural health guy, this golden spice is something I never would have expected.

When you fix these broken cellular doors, your blood sugar can finally normalize naturally - without forcing your system with more medications.

I've just released a free presentation revealing this 30-second blood sugar reset ritual and the exact golden spice that's helped thousands of my patients.

Click below to watch this free presentation before it's taken down.











90-Second Blood Sugar Video Ad Script - Sleep Apnea Hook

Why your sleep apnea is making diabetes impossible to control.

If you're diabetic and also struggle with sleep apnea, you're fighting a battle you can't win - because every night of disrupted sleep is sabotaging your blood sugar control.

Most people don't realize that sleep apnea creates a vicious cycle: the interrupted breathing spikes stress hormones like cortisol, which floods your system with glucose all night long. Then you wake up with elevated blood sugar that stays high all day.

I'm Dr. [Expert Name], a board-certified endocrinologist who's treated over 10,000 diabetic patients in my 18-year career.

Here's what shocked me: Even if you get your sleep apnea treated with a CPAP machine, your blood sugar can still remain stubborn because the real problem isn't just the sleep disruption - it's how chronic sleep apnea damages something called your "cellular glucose doors."

You see, your cells have tiny protein channels called GLUT4 transporters that act like microscopic doors, allowing glucose to enter where it belongs. But sleep apnea creates inflammation that makes these doors "rusty and stuck."

That's why I spent months researching an ancient Himalayan rice ritual that actually repairs these cellular glucose doors in just 30 seconds a day.

The people of this region have been using a specific golden spice with their rice for centuries - and they have virtually no diabetes despite eating high-carb diets. I'm not talking about turmeric here. As a big natural health guy, this golden spice is something I never would have expected.

When you fix these broken cellular doors, your blood sugar can finally normalize naturally - without forcing your system with more medications.

I've just released a free presentation revealing this 30-second blood sugar reset ritual and the exact golden spice that's helped thousands of my patients.
